case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. VS. SIMONE V. YZAGUIRRE

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. SERVED NOV-15-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YZAGUIRRE, SIMONE V.

DECLARATION CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-19-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS REPORT RE BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-19-2011 CONTINUED TO OCT-21-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S), OR FILE DISMISSAL FOLLOWING TERMINATION OF DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-05-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S), OR FILE DISMISSAL FOLLOWING TERMINATION OF DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY. THE OCT-21-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
